name: legacy
description: Legacy — the verbatim, lossless archive of the original Roboto / VLDS brainstorm that seeded the `roboto` and `vlds` plugins. Formerly the untracked, gitignored `.temp/` scratch directory; copied here word-for-word and preserved as an installable plugin so the brainstorm now runs from/as `legacy` and lives under version control. The only rewrites:`/mnt/…` Claude.ai sandbox file-pointers, which were repointed to their in-plugin locations; and a handful of personal-profile values were replaced with synthetic stand-ins for privacy (see the README). Reference/provenance only — not an active skill plugin.
